name: Document Git Revert Recovery Workflow

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in Document Git Revert Recovery Workflow is complete and correct

scope: Document the git revert workflow in docs/humans/failure-and-recovery.md. Now that the daemon commits code and state together after every iteration, users can recover from bad task outcomes by reverting to the commit before the failed task. Add a section explaining: all state files and code are committed together, git log shows wolfcastle commits with task titles, to retry a failed task revert to the commit before it and restart the daemon. Include a concrete example with git log and git revert commands.
success_criteria: docs/humans/failure-and-recovery.md contains a section documenting git revert recovery with a concrete example

breadcrumbs.text: Created 1 child: write-git-revert-recovery-section. Single leaf with one documentation task. No specs needed since the deterministic-git spec already defines the commit format. No ordering constraints (single child).
